The '''Umber Banks''' were located near some plains of planet [[Bresnan]], on [[Wellte-ir system/Legends|Wellte-ir system]].<ref name="Pandemonium" />

The Umber Banks were the battlefield of the [[Wellte-ir Massacre]], where fifteen of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Scandium Team]] members were killed. Scandium member [[Aven Cholus]] rescued the other five survivors.<ref name="Pandemonium" />
